ul.li: R1 (Accumulator): Volatile aggregate state. Lifetime spans group processing.
R2 (Extracted Field): Transient storage for raw row data before accumulation.
Blocking Op: OP_SorterSort acts as a full execution barrier. Aggregation cannot be finalized until the sorter flushes.
OpCode Sequence: AggStep -> SorterNext -> AggFinalize -> Filter.
Aggregator state is designed to fit within L1 cache (approx. 64B per aggregate context) to minimize memory stall during Update Accumulator.
If HAVING contains AND clauses, OP_Filter is chained with multiple jump offsets to optimize CPU branch prediction.

g.title: Generates Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) and translates to VM Opcodes
Virtual Database Engine executing byte-code: Registers R0-Rn
B-Tree based intermediate storage for GROUP BY operations
Accumulator logic for SUM(), COUNT(), AVG(), MIN(), MAX()

g.text: OP_Explain ("SELECT x, SUM(y) GROUP BY x HAVING SUM(y) > 500")
Return Final Aggregated State (R1 = Calculated Value)
OP_Reset (Flush Register R1 for next iteration)

div.p: The comparator gate executes after the OP_AggFinalize instruction has populated the target Register R1.
